---
title: "Presentation Title"
subtitle: "Optional subtitle"
author: "Dany Laksono"
date: "2026-05-28"
description: "Short description for the presentations index."
categories: [presentation]
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: c/t
    controls: true
    progress: true
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    incremental: false
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    css: styles.css
---

## Opening

- First point
- Second point
- Third point

---

## Add Assets

Place images, GIFs, and other media in `assets/`, then reference them like this:

```markdown
![](./assets/example.png)
```

---

## Closing

Your final slide goes here.
